set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF)
add_subdirectory(sqlite)
target_compile_definitions(sqlite3 PUBLIC
    SQLITE_THREADSAFE=0
    #SQLITE_DISABLE_LFS=1
    SQLITE_DISABLE_FTS3_UNICODE=1
    SQLITE_DISABLE_FTS4_DEFERRED=1
    SQLITE_DISABLE_PAGECACHE_OVERFLOW_STATS=1
    SQLITE_DEFAULT_MEMSTATUS=0
    SQLITE_LIKE_DOESNT_MATCH_BLOBS=1
    SQLITE_MAX_EXPR_DEPTH=0
    SQLITE_OMIT_DECLTYPE=1
    #SQLITE_OMIT_ANALYZE=1
    #SQLITE_OMIT_ATTACH=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_AUTHORIZATION=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_AUTOMATIC_INDEX=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_AUTORESET=1
    #SQLITE_OMIT_AUTOVACUUM=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_CASE_SENSITIVE_LIKE_PRAGMA=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_CAST=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_CHECK=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_COMPILEOPTION_DIAGS=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_COMPLETE=1
    #SQLITE_OMIT_CTE=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_DATETIME_FUNCS=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_SHARED_CACHE=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_DEPRECATED=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_EXPLAIN=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_GENERATED_COLUMNS=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_GET_TABLE=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_INCRBLOB=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_INTROSPECTION_PRAGMAS=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_JSON=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_LIKE_OPTIMIZATION=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_LOAD_EXTENSION=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_LOCALTIME=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_MEMORYDB=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_PROGRESS_CALLBACK=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_TRACE=1
    #SQLITE_OMIT_TRIGGER=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_UTF16=1
    #SQLITE_OMIT_VIRTUALTABLE=1
    #SQLITE_OMIT_WINDOWFUNC=1
    SQLITE_UNTESTABLE=1
    SQLITE_USE_ALLOCA=1
    SQLITE_OMIT_AUTOINIT=1
)

set(LV_CONF_BUILD_DISABLE_EXAMPLES ON)
set(LV_CONF_BUILD_DISABLE_DEMOS ON)
set(LV_BUILD_CONF_PATH "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/lv_conf.h" CACHE STRING "Local da configuração do LVGL")

add_subdirectory(fw_env)
add_subdirectory(lvgl)
add_subdirectory(lv_fonts EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
target_compile_definitions(lvgl PRIVATE LV_CONF_INCLUDE_SIMPLE)
if (BUILD_SHARED_LIBS)
    target_compile_options(lvgl PRIVATE -fPIC)
endif()
target_include_directories(lvgl PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../src)
target_link_libraries(lvgl INTERFACE lv_fonts)

if (MBGUI_USE_JPEG)
    target_link_libraries(lvgl INTERFACE jpeg)
endif()

if (MBGUI_USE_RLOTTIE)
    add_subdirectory(rlottie EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
    target_link_libraries(lvgl INTERFACE rlottie::rlottie)
    target_compile_definitions(lvgl PUBLIC LV_USE_RLOTTIE=1)
    set_target_properties(rlottie PROPERTIES EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL ${BUILD_SHARED_LIBS})
    target_link_libraries(lvgl PUBLIC rlottie)
endif()

target_compile_options(sqlite3 PRIVATE
    -Wno-all
    -Wno-extra
)

target_compile_options(lvgl PRIVATE
    -Wno-all
    -Wno-extra
    $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-Os -ggdb>
)
